    Primitive objects¶

    In [1]:
    Copied! 
    from fdray import *


def render(*args):
    return Scene(
        Camera(20, 30, view_scale=2.2),
        LightSource((0.5, 90, 40), "white"),
        Cylinder((0, 0, 0), (2, 0, 0), 0.02, Color("red")),
        Cylinder((0, 0, 0), (0, 2, 0), 0.02, Color("green")),
        Cylinder((0, 0, 0), (0, 0, 2), 0.02, Color("blue")),
        *args,
    ).render(width=300, height=300)
    from fdray import * def render(*args): return Scene( Camera(20, 30, view_scale=2.2), LightSource((0.5, 90, 40), "white"), Cylinder((0, 0, 0), (2, 0, 0), 0.02, Color("red")), Cylinder((0, 0, 0), (0, 2, 0), 0.02, Color("green")), Cylinder((0, 0, 0), (0, 0, 2), 0.02, Color("blue")), *args, ).render(width=300, height=300)

    Box¶

    In [2]:
    Copied! 
    render(Box(0, (1, 1.4, 1.8), Color("#ff33ff77")))
    render(Box(0, (1, 1.4, 1.8), Color("#ff33ff77")))
    Out[2]:
    In [3]:
    Copied! 
    render(Cuboid(0, (1, 1.4, 1.8), Color("#33ffff77")))
    render(Cuboid(0, (1, 1.4, 1.8), Color("#33ffff77")))
    Out[3]:
    In [4]:
    Copied! 
    render(Cube(0.5, 1.5, Color("gold", 0.5)))
    render(Cube(0.5, 1.5, Color("gold", 0.5)))
    Out[4]:
    In [5]:
    Copied! 
    render(Cube().pigment(Color("gold", 0.5)))
    render(Cube().pigment(Color("gold", 0.5)))
    Out[5]:

    Cone¶

    In [6]:
    Copied! 
    render(Cone("x", 1, "y", 0.5, Color("darkgreen", 0.5)))
    render(Cone("x", 1, "y", 0.5, Color("darkgreen", 0.5)))
    Out[6]:
    In [7]:
    Copied! 
    render(Cone("-0.5*x", 1, "z", 0.5, "open", Color("dimgrey", 0.5)))
    render(Cone("-0.5*x", 1, "z", 0.5, "open", Color("dimgrey", 0.5)))
    Out[7]:

    Cylinder¶

    In [8]:
    Copied! 
    render(Cylinder("-z", "y", 0.5, Color("dimgrey", 0.5)))
    render(Cylinder("-z", "y", 0.5, Color("dimgrey", 0.5)))
    Out[8]:

    Sphere¶

    In [10]:
    Copied! 
    render(Sphere(0, 1.5, Color("coral", 0.5)))
    render(Sphere(0, 1.5, Color("coral", 0.5)))
    Out[10]:
    In [11]:
    Copied! 
    render(Sphere().pigment(Color("brown", 0.5)).finish(phong=0.3))
    render(Sphere().pigment(Color("brown", 0.5)).finish(phong=0.3))
    Out[11]:

    SphereSweep¶

    In [12]:
    Copied! 
    render(
    SphereSweep(
        "linear_spline",
        [0, (0, 1, 0), (0, 0, 1.5), (2, 0, 0)],
        [0.1, 0.2, 0.1, 0.2],
    )
    .pigment(Color("yellow", 0.5))
    .finish(phong=0.3),
)
    render( SphereSweep( "linear_spline", [0, (0, 1, 0), (0, 0, 1.5), (2, 0, 0)], [0.1, 0.2, 0.1, 0.2], ) .pigment(Color("yellow", 0.5)) .finish(phong=0.3), )
    Out[12]:
    In [13]:
    Copied! 
    render(
    Polyline([(0, 0, 0), (0, 1, 0), (0, 0, 1.5), (2, 0, 0)], 0.2)
    .pigment(Color("purple", 0.5))
    .finish(phong=0.5, brilliance=0.5),
)
    render( Polyline([(0, 0, 0), (0, 1, 0), (0, 0, 1.5), (2, 0, 0)], 0.2) .pigment(Color("purple", 0.5)) .finish(phong=0.5, brilliance=0.5), )
    Out[13]:
    In [14]:
    Copied! 
    render(
    Curve([(0, 0, 0), (0, 1, 0), (0, 0, 1.5), (2, 0, 0)], 0.2)
    .pigment(Color("ivory", 0.5))
    .finish(phong=0.5, brilliance=0.5),
)
    render( Curve([(0, 0, 0), (0, 1, 0), (0, 0, 1.5), (2, 0, 0)], 0.2) .pigment(Color("ivory", 0.5)) .finish(phong=0.5, brilliance=0.5), )
    Out[14]:

    Text¶

    In [15]:
    Copied! 
    render(Text("text", 0.1, Color("teal")))
    render(Text("text", 0.1, Color("teal")))
    Out[15]:
    In [16]:
    Copied! 
    render(Text("text", 0, Color("teal")).align())
    render(Text("text", 0, Color("teal")).align())
    Out[16]:
    In [17]:
    Copied! 
    def axis_label(text, color):
    return Text(text, 0, Color(color)).scale(0.5).align(20, 30)


render(
    axis_label("x", "red").translate(2.7, 0, 0),
    axis_label("y", "green").translate(0, 2.05, -0.1),
    axis_label("z", "blue").translate(0, -0.1, 2.05),
)
    def axis_label(text, color): return Text(text, 0, Color(color)).scale(0.5).align(20, 30) render( axis_label("x", "red").translate(2.7, 0, 0), axis_label("y", "green").translate(0, 2.05, -0.1), axis_label("z", "blue").translate(0, -0.1, 2.05), )
    Out[17]:
